intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-compliant with the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2 (Mexican Mint) are not visible as established specimens. P3 (Pothos) and P4 (Silver Guest) are absent or reduced to non-identifiable soil debris.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: White rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot contains only dark, damp soil. No String of Nickels present.
plant_audit.P2: Black pot contains only dark, damp soil. No Mexican Mint present.
plant_audit.P3: Black pot contains a white rabbit figurine and soil debris. No Pothos present.
plant_audit.P4: Black pot contains soil debris. No Silver Guest present.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; potential for over-saturation.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Presence of white, crystalline-like fragments (possibly perlite or mineral buildup) on the surface of the black pot.
biome_observations.desk_surface: A metallic object (spoon) appears in T-3, and a cylindrical white object (possibly a sensor or bottle) appears in T-1 and CURRENT.

temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-3: Introduction of a metallic spoon near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Removal of the spoon; lighting shift suggests camera adjustment.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Introduction of a white cylindrical object near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Minimal change; the biome remains in a state of stasis with no vegetative growth.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. There is no active plant life visible in any of the pots. The soil appears to be in a state of neglect or post-mortem decomposition.
anomalies: New Introduction: White cylindrical object (T-1 to CURRENT).
Systemic Loss: Total absence of registered botanical specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete failure of the botanical registry. The pots are devoid of the expected plants (P1-P4). The environment appears to be a collection of empty containers with damp soil and non-botanical artifacts (rabbit figurine, spoon, cylinder). No growth has occurred over the 5-day observation period.
